finding: gap4 float32 dense-direct ceiling greatly exceeds adapter prediction
required_action: Prioritize dynamic adapter training and/or rate-counted motion/residual side-info.
If q_gap is small, raising keyframe quantization alone will not recover paper-level middle PSNR.
